data.title: Majority Of Fund Managers Anticipate Fed Rate Cuts In 2025
data.description: According to Odaily, a global fund manager survey conducted by Bank of America in February reveals that most respondents expect the Federal Reserve to cut interest rates this year. Approximately 77% of the surveyed fund managers anticipate a rate cut by the Fed in 2025. Among them, 46% foresee two rate cuts, 27% predict one, and 4% expect three cuts. Meanwhile, 19% of respondents believe interest rates will remain unchanged, and only 1% anticipate a rate hike by the Federal Reserve in 2025.

data.title: Chinese Ethereum holder spends $6.8M to warn against mass mind control
data.description:
A Chinese programmer sent about $6.8 million in ETH to burn addresses and donations, claiming corporations were using mind-control technology to enslave people.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/chinese-man-burns-eth-mind-control-claims?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Xu Zhengyu: Continuously review and improve the regulatory system to cultivate a more complete Hong Kong virtual asset ecosystem
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News - Hong Kong Financial Services and the Treasury Bureau Director Paul Hui said that the regulatory system in Hong Kong is being constantly reviewed and improved to foster a more complete virtual asset ecosystem, including the development of a comprehensive framework that includes virtual asset exchanges, stablecoin issuers, custodians and over-the-counter trading activities.
Paul Hui said that Hong Kong is building a bridge between traditional finance and the rapidly developing digital economy, and the regulatory framework has established a solid foundation for this trend of change. For example, the Securities and Futures Commission has announced regulatory expectations for intermediaries engaged in tokenized securities-related activities, providing clarity for market participants and creating a credible innovation environment. He emphasized that the trend of tokenization and the transformation of artificial intelligence can only realize their full potential in a reliable and adaptable regulatory system, and will protect the market with fairness, consistency and the highest standards. (Yahoo Finance)

data.title: Market News: Tether plans to acquire majority stake in South American energy company Adecoagro
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market news, Tether plans to acquire a majority controlling stake (51%) in South American energy company Adecoagro.

data.title:
$BTC A few days aside, the new york session (US Market Open) has been extremely weak and has caused many of the full retraces we've seen the past few weeks.

Generally the Europe & Asia sessions try to consolidate or recover a bit until the US Session sells off again.
Binance responds to PI community voting controversy: votes that do not meet the requirements or are from users in inapplicable regions and votes that violate terms and conditions will be removed
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance Customer Support responded to community users on the X platform regarding the PI community voting dispute, saying: "According to relevant requirements, it has been marked in the simplified Chinese announcement of "Binance Community Voting", including but not limited to users living in mainland China and other countries or regions will not be counted in the valid voting results. At the end of the event, we will remove votes that do not meet the conditions or from users in inapplicable regions and votes that violate the terms and conditions, and announce the final number of valid votes. The results of this vote are for reference only, and whether the project will be launched will be evaluated and decided based on the official listing review process and standards."

data.title: Central Bank Governor Pan Gongsheng: We will implement a more proactive fiscal policy and a moderately loose monetary policy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Pan Gongsheng, governor of the People's Bank of China, was invited to attend the seminar on emerging market economies jointly hosted by the International Monetary Fund and Saudi Arabia and delivered a keynote speech. Pan Gongsheng pointed out that in 2024, China's economy continued to recover and improve, achieving the annual economic growth target of 5%. Especially since late September last year, the Chinese government has introduced a package of incremental policies to effectively boost social confidence and the economy has recovered significantly. In the next step, the Chinese government will implement a more proactive fiscal policy and a moderately loose monetary policy, strengthen the countercyclical regulation of macroeconomic policies, continue to promote the transformation of China's economic growth model, and consolidate and enhance the momentum of economic recovery. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bank of America survey: Most investors expect the Fed to cut interest rates in 2025
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bank of America's February global fund manager survey showed that most respondents expect the Federal Reserve to cut interest rates this year. The survey showed that about 77% of fund managers surveyed expected the Federal Reserve to cut interest rates in 2025. 46% of investors expected two rate cuts, 27% expected one rate cut, and 4% expected three rate cuts. The survey showed that 19% of respondents expected interest rates to remain unchanged. Only 1% of investors expected the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates in 2025. (Jinshi)

data.title: OpenSea CEO: I will not tolerate any vicious attacks
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Devin Finzer, co-founder and CEO of OpenSea, posted on the X platform that he has listened to feedback on the current XP system and suspended XP used directly for listing and bidding. OpenSea will continue to reward buyers and holders who use OS2. 
Regarding liquidity incentives, I want to make it clear that OpenSea operates in a highly competitive market. Liquidity is the foundation of any market, so it will seriously consider adjustments/enhancements, but some form of liquidity rewards is very important for providing strong products in the market. At present, some vicious verbal attacks have been seen on the X platform. OpenSea is listening closely during the construction process, but will not allow bullying.

data.title: Bitcoin is favored by hedge funds and banks, and Standard Chartered Bank is optimistic about its long-term growth potential
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Standard Chartered Bank analyst Geoff Kendrick said that if regulatory changes improve investor access and volatility decreases, Bitcoin may attract new buyers over time. The data from the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on the purchase of Bitcoin in the fourth quarter is "very encouraging." Although hedge funds once again dominated the buying, bank buying was also strong. Abu Dhabi's sovereign wealth fund reported holding a position equivalent to 4,700 bitcoins in BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin ETF. He said, "Although this scale is small at present, it is expected to increase in size, and other sovereign funds may also start buying." Bitcoin is expected to reach $500,000 before Trump leaves office in 2029. (Jinshi)
